bio: According to my parents, I could name every car on the road by the time I was two. Now I'm an incoming junior at West Linn High School, still chasing that obsession with cars alongside a growing interest in chemistry and entrepreneurship. I started High School Shine two years ago to bring those interests together — using a research-driven approach to figure out what actually works on a specific paint or interior, instead of guessing. I genuinely love this work, and there's nothing better than stepping back and seeing the shine on a freshly detailed car.
